impact: This gives the worker a deterministic next cycle after repeated invalid Python proposals: it parks broad retry behavior, removes stale in-progress ambiguity, and tells the daemon to compile the changed test file before broader validation while using exact fixture paths and simple assertions only.
summary: Narrow PP&D daemon recovery to an exact-path, syntax-first validator retry with explicit malformed-fragment stop rules.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 6 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
